title: dendrosenecio johnstonii var. friesiorum
intro: Dendrosenecio johnstonii var. friesiorum, also known as Fries's giant groundsel, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of East Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds, fever, and other health issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. Dendrosenecio johnstonii var. friesiorum can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
